release.deck: This dev build keeps the overnight performance work moving with a stronger macOS window recovery path, lighter dense Map movement, and the same-day Friends, source sidebar, runtime telemetry, and read-state performance fixes.
fixes: Opening Freed from the dock or Finder now always reasserts the primary window, even when the native visible-window flag incorrectly reports that a window is already visible.
Dense Map views now defer lower-priority marker paint while the map is actively zooming or panning, so large location sets do less frame work during interaction.
Runtime health telemetry now keeps a bounded tail instead of letting renderer heartbeats, DOM counts, event-loop lag, and scrape memory preflight records grow without limit.
Hidden renderer timer throttling is classified separately from foreground event-loop lag so soak metrics stop blaming macOS background timer behavior for app jank.
Dense Friends graph interaction now caps the transient draw layer at the 1,600-person scale while restoring the full graph after interaction settles.
Friends graph interaction culling and Bound runtime health log retention
Source sidebar search now filters sources immediately while the heavier feed search stays debounced
Friends graph zoom and pan keep production debug payloads out of the hot path.
The Friends last-seen to Map handoff now guards stale MapLibre marker work so view changes cannot crash the app.
Map handoff crash guard, hidden renderer heartbeat telemetry, and dense Friends and Map performance fixes
Compact feed read-on-scroll tracking now resets its session key correctly when the visible item set changes

releaseBody:
(AI Generated).

## Freed v26.5.806-dev

This dev build keeps the overnight performance work moving with a stronger macOS window recovery path, lighter dense Map movement, and the same-day Friends, source sidebar, runtime telemetry, and read-state performance fixes.

### Fixes

- Opening Freed from the dock or Finder now always reasserts the primary window, even when the native visible-window flag incorrectly reports that a window is already visible.
- Dense Map views now defer lower-priority marker paint while the map is actively zooming or panning, so large location sets do less frame work during interaction.
- Runtime health telemetry now keeps a bounded tail instead of letting renderer heartbeats, DOM counts, event-loop lag, and scrape memory preflight records grow without limit.
- Bound runtime health log retention
- Hidden renderer timer throttling is classified separately from foreground event-loop lag so soak metrics stop blaming macOS background timer behavior for app jank.
- Dense Friends graph interaction now caps the transient draw layer at the 1,600-person scale while restoring the full graph after interaction settles.
- Friends graph interaction culling and Bound runtime health log retention
- Source sidebar search now filters sources immediately while the heavier feed search stays debounced
- Friends graph zoom and pan keep production debug payloads out of the hot path.
- The Friends last-seen to Map handoff now guards stale MapLibre marker work so view changes cannot crash the app.
- Map handoff crash guard, hidden renderer heartbeat telemetry, and dense Friends and Map performance fixes
- Compact feed read-on-scroll tracking now resets its session key correctly when the visible item set changes

### Follow-ups

- Continue the installed soak after v26.5.806-dev is available and verify the macOS reopen fix against the zero-window state reproduced in v26.5.805-dev
- Continue the installed soak and watch WebKit process pressure separately from foreground frame timing

### Downloads

**macOS:** `.dmg` (Apple Silicon or Intel, signed + notarized)  
**Windows:** `.exe` (NSIS installer)  
**Linux:** `.AppImage`  

> macOS downloads are signed and notarized for normal Gatekeeper installation.
